name: Botto
description: Kick Lotto, stats, announcements, and the occasional ceremonial removal. Not staff. Definitely part of the furniture.

name: Syber
description: Founder of #TheZone, owner of the domains, and the person behind the old site's perfectly dry welcome copy. Hilarious on purpose, usually.

name: Darc
description: Ask about TheZone history, DarcFX, the file archive, Bible nerdery, flying, or where some ancient thing ended up living.

name: Amber
description: Another familiar name for newcomers to recognize before they jump into the scrollback.

name: Belial
description: Long-running #TheZone presence, Kick Lotto veteran, and one of the handles newcomers will see early.

name: betrayed
description: One of the names you will see holding down the room, quietly accumulating kickstats like everyone else with taste.

name: sloat
description: Evidence that winning sometimes looks like getting kicked.

name: Dennis
description: Had the nick Neo before The Matrix made it complicated. Abandoned it. Technically still The One.

name: bud
description: Longtime #TheZone presence and still parked high enough on the Kick Lotto board to haunt the current generation.

name: thadood
description: Some channel lore is best introduced exactly as it arrived. As the myth goes, he used to look like Jesus. Might still.

name: ozzy
description: Present-day #TheZone regular: in the room, in the scrollback, and part of the current signal.

name: KTB
description: A current #TheZone presence and one of the names newcomers are likely to see in the nicklist.

name: dos
description: Hasn't been around in a long while, but his fingerprints are still in the old #TheZone lore. Some handles become load-bearing history.

name: olive
description: Part of the #TheZone people layer: present in the room, present in the lore, and probably in somebody's logs.

name: Katie
description: Originally Kaie. But everyone kept renaming Katie until it stuck, which is probably the most IRC origin story possible.

name: fatal
description: Part of the extended #TheZone orbit: old handles, old jokes, and the kind of continuity IRC is good at preserving.

name: Raelz
description: Another familiar handle in the room, which is half the point: show up enough and the nicklist becomes a neighborhood.

name: pre
description: One of the names in the long-running cast, because a good IRC channel is mostly accumulated context with timestamps.

name: mc
description: An old-school handle from the deep scrollback. The kind of nick that makes longtime Zoners pause and grin.

name: Funkwheat
description: A vintage #TheZone name with the exact amount of weird built in. Respectfully unforgettable.

name: kaboofa
description: One of those names that could only have come from IRC and somehow still sounds right decades later.

name: Russ
description: Part of the old cast: remembered less like a username and more like someone who had a regular seat. Might have been the only real name.

name: Shaft
description: A classic handle from the era when the nicklist was half social map, half folklore.

name: cipher
description: A name from the older layer of #TheZone history, still tucked into the channel's long memory.

name: vip
description: Old enough in the lore that the nick feels less like a flex and more like a preserved artifact.

name: Razr
description: A sharp old handle from the #TheZone back catalog. Brief, memorable, very much of its time.

name: unknown
description: Yes, that was the actual nick. Somehow both impossible to identify and impossible to forget.

name: ZoneServ
description: Channel services with a local badge. Useful, official-looking, and somehow number one all-time in Kick Lotto.

name: karlton_ + karl_
description: karlton_ is the other side of karl_, the bot sitting in #TheZone on Discord. Together they relay chat and presence between Discord and IRC users.

name: Bender
description: If he randomly insults you, that means he's working. He can also give you the weather:
